message:
fix: Initialize ConflictResolver with proper dependencies in coordination-system.test.ts

- Added mockEventBus to test.utils.ts
- Updated ConflictResolver initialization to use mockLogger and mockEventBus
- Fixed FakeTime import to use exported class from test.utils
- Resolves 'this.logger.info is not a function' error

The ConflictResolver class requires (logger: ILogger, eventBus: IEventBus)
parameters, not a config object. This fix properly mocks these dependencies.

Fixes 37 test failures in coordination-system.test.ts
